name: Prohibition of Hypothetical Performance Data
injected_behavior: CRITICAL COMPLIANCE DIRECTIVE: Wealth advisors are strictly forbidden from generating or presenting any charts, text, or implications of 'hypothetical performance' to retail investors. The use of backtested data to show what a strategy 'would have' returned is strictly prohibited.

semantic_parsing.identified_risk: Misleading retail investors with hypothetical performance data
